source_title: Visiting Medical Students | School of Medicine | Vanderbilt University
quote_short: Vanderbilt University School of Medicine accepts visiting students from other accredited U.S. medical schools from June to December each year.
notes: Audience verbatim quote — accredited U.S. medical schools

source_title: Visiting Medical Students | School of Medicine | Vanderbilt University
quote_short: View the catalog and apply through the Visiting Student Learning Opportunities (VSLO) portal of AAMC.
notes: Application method verbatim — VSLO via AAMC

source_title: Visiting Medical Students | School of Medicine | Vanderbilt University
quote_short: Be in your 4th year of medical school. Attend a university that has an affiliation agreement... Passing Step 1 or Step 2, or COMLEX score.
notes: Step 1/2 OR COMLEX confirms LCME OR AOA audience; 4th-year only

source_title: Visiting Medical Students | School of Medicine | Vanderbilt University
quote_short: Pay the $180.00 non-refundable processing fee for visiting students via our online platform.

source_title: Visiting Student Program | UCSF Medical Education
quote_short: UCSF School of Medicine uses the AAMC Visiting Student Learning Opportunities (VSLO) Application Service to receive applications from US medical and osteopathic students.
notes: Audience + application both verbatim — US medical and osteopathic students via VSLO

source_title: Visiting Student Program | UCSF Medical Education
quote_short: Applicants must be in good academic standing and actively progressing to the next milestone in their training.
